Use this template to create a basic layout for posting a level. Use the code fround below in a page you wanna make about a level and fill in the blanks.```<code> </code>``
{{LevelPage|
|LEVELNAME=Name of level
|IMAGENAME= Name of the image you uploaded. (Example:Lamda Bunker.jpg
|IMAGETEXT= Text that will display under image.
|INFO1=Text displayed under header and to left of image.
|LAYOUT=Text describing the layout of the level.
}}
``<code> </code>```

Example below:

'''Test'''

<div class="thumb tright"><div class="thumbinner" style="width:202px;">[[File:Lamda_Bunker.JPG|Lamda Bunker]] <div class="thumbcaption"><div class="magnify" style="float:right"><a href="/wiki/index.php/Image_Lamda_Bunker.JPG/"><img alt="" src="/wiki/skins/common/images/magnify-clip.png"/></a></div>Lamda Bunker</div></div></div>

TEST ME

'''Layout'''
This level has this layout

[[Category:Guides]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721115422/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Leveltemplate -->
